The '''"Out System" Scout Vessel''' was deployed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to be used for finding new [[Planet/Legends|planets]] (it was famously used during the search for a suitable planet with which the Empire could replace its operations on [[Demophon]]), although it was originally designed by the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] to serve as a [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship]]. One "Out System" Scout Vessel was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the [[Stribos system/Legends|Stribos system]], by neutralizing it before it could jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="EJ" />
